'''Xtib''' was the processing company responsible for the production of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] fuel [[Tibanna/Legends|TibannaX]], an exotic [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] isotope used in [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[StealthX]] fighter engines to limit the visibility of their ion tails.<ref name="The Swarm War">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref> The corporation was founded during the latter end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|344}}</ref>

During the [[Swarm War]], [[Bornaryn Trading]], under the leadership of co-founder [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Aryn Dro Thul]], took control of Xtib to let [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Skywalker]] know that they were aware of the plan to assassinate [[Raynar Thul]].<ref name="The Swarm War" />
